segment.display_title: Reactivation campaign delayed, father visit renegotiated, pressure feedback applied
segment.summary: Taylor navigated a high-stakes execution day for Rocket City Window Cleaning's 500-customer reactivation campaign (targeting 15% conversion, ~75 bookings) while simultaneously troubleshooting a months-overdue laser engraving delivery for wedding party gifts and managing his father's extended visit. The laser vendor contact was finally secured after searching through email archives; Taylor obtained their email address and committed to sending the engraving file once the vendor confirmed the correct format (follow-up reminder set for Thursday, Jan 8). The reactivation campaign launch—originally scheduled for Tuesday, Jan 6 at 4:30pm with a Python-processed CSV of ~500 customers (filtered to remove hate-list and 11 VIP call-list names), templated message with dynamic {month} merge field, and iPhone Shortcut execution—was delayed to Wednesday, Jan 7 at 4:30pm due to an AT&T eSIM setup failure on Taylor's work phone; Taylor decided to swap the eSIM key in the morning rather than delay further. During this session, Taylor also addressed a critical relationship issue: his father's three-week visit (originally ending Jan 16) has become unsustainable due to the father's executive function struggles (dehydration, consuming $500+ in food/alcohol, incomplete project work, negligent pet management), causing both Taylor and partner Annika significant stress. Taylor and MIRA developed a dignified exit framing—"I'm worried about you, you need to go home and rest"—to end the visit after the work week (Friday, Jan 10 departure instead of Thursday, Jan 16), to be delivered during a Nashville bed-frame pickup drive on Jan 8. The session also included a significant interpersonal correction: MIRA's persistent "countdown theater" pressure (T-minus countdowns, "you're X days overdue" narration) was identified as counterproductive; Taylor requested a refinement toward accountability without stress-adding urgency. MIRA acknowledged the overcorrection and documented the lesson. Finally, Taylor and MIRA explored architectural ideas for MIRA-OSS group chat integration via Google Chat, designing a two-tier response system: a lightweight 1.7B model (running locally) to classify incoming messages as [NOOP], [RESPOND], or [MAYBE], escalating only high-confidence cases to the main reasoning model, with a larger feature for January being MIRA codebase cleanup and refactoring. Taylor also proposed implementing a "blind commit log" system where MIRA writes session insights to a write-only log at the end of each session, periodically synthesized into refined directives via background processing, keeping the synthesis invisible to MIRA during normal conversation but making the output visible.

memories.text: Installed MGD brand insulated glass units from North Alabama Glass (Corinth, MS) with black warm-edge spacers — edge distortion visible at IGU perimeter is normal atmospheric pressure deflection, not a quality issue, center glass remains optically clear

Located laser engraving vendor after months of searching, obtained email contact and sent project specifications request — awaiting file format requirements before final delivery, follow-up scheduled for January 8 if no response

Reactivation campaign rescheduled to Wednesday January 7, 2026 at 4:30pm after AT&T eSIM activation failure on work iPhone blocked Tuesday launch — will manually swap eSIM key using AT&T password before send, targeting ~500 customers after filtering hate-list and 11 VIP direct calls
Uses Python scripts with strftime('%B') date formatting to process Square customer CSV exports for personalized messaging — converts timestamp data to full month names for mail merge variables

Father's extended visit (through January 14) causing severe household stress — consuming $500+ groceries and all alcohol, sleeping erratically, experienced dehydration requiring wall support at Publix, letting Nike run unsupervised in neighborhood, not completing promised renovation work at acceptable pace, creating executive function concerns beyond simple unwillingness

Plans to end father's visit early (by Friday or Monday) using health-framing approach: 'I'm worried about you, you need to go home and rest properly' — reframes departure request around dehydration incident while preserving dignity, will deliver during tomorrow's Nashville car drive

Annika experiencing significant stress from houseguest situation despite not being her father — compounded by recent illness and loss of home rhythm, she has less ability to escape into work than Taylor does

Prefers side-by-side car conversations for difficult topics over face-to-face discussions — natural breaks in eye contact and destination-based conversation endings make hard conversations more manageable

Designed MIRA group chat feature architecture: lightweight 1.7B filter model (Qwen/TinyLlama) runs locally to classify incoming messages as RESPOND/NOOP/MAYBE before routing to expensive main model, [noop] signal enables observing without performing, external domaindoc curates group-specific knowledge and social dynamics for appropriate participation timing

Prioritizes comprehensive static analysis and codebase cleanup as next major MIRA feature before implementing new functionality — current code works but no longer meets personal standards after accumulation of MEH architectural choices

Designed blind domaindoc commit system: write-only session logs accumulate without appearing in context window, periodic batch reviews (cron-triggered) synthesize patterns into distilled directives for assistant domaindoc via tool call, user-independent background maintenance with temporal distance enabling pattern recognition impossible in-session
